_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Only use pre-existing database model fields verified against schema.prisma.
Ensure strict compliance with all model relations, enums, and required values.
Leave all image and document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel.

project.name: Urbtech Hilston
project.address: Plot No. SC-01, Sector 79, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201305
project.description: A highly efficient, mid-market ready-to-move-in society in Sector 79, Noida, offering excellent pricing, clean legal compliance, and immediate occupancies.
project.long_description: Urbtech Hilston stands as a pragmatic and highly popular choice for families looking for ready-to-move-in apartments without premium brand markups. Developed across 6 acres, the project features 3 high-rise towers rising G+18 floors, housing 222 units in Phase 1. Designed for optimal ventilation, each apartment is three-side open, offering sweeping views of Sector 79's green landscaping. The project has received its full Occupancy Certificates (OC) and active registrations, offering zero construction risk and standard bank financing support. The society features a fully equipped gymnasium, swimming pool, badminton court, and reliable 24/7 power backup systems.
marketing_claims: Ready to move with OCs and active registries
Fully equipped active clubhouse and gym
ai_search_keywords: ready to move flats central noida

builder.name: Urbtech India Developers
builder.company_overview: Urbtech India is a premier mid-market developer with over 22 years of history, delivering commercial IT parks and residential spaces across Noida and Greater Noida. The group is respected for cost-effective construction layouts and highly transparent legal compliances.

unit_types.name: 2.5 BHK (Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: Highly optimized 2 BHK with study
unit_types.description: Compact and cost-effective layout featuring vitrified floor tiles, granite kitchen platforms, and three-side open cross-ventilation.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Premium)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious family 3 BHK
unit_types.description: Spacious layout featuring laminated wood bedroom floors, spacious living-dining zones, and distinct balcony vistas.
whats_included: Laminated wood flooring in master bedroom
Standard vitrified floor tiles in other rooms
Concealed copper wiring with modular switches

connectivity.name: Noida Sector 101 Metro Station (Aqua Line)
connectivity.notes: Aqua line metro connectivity to Noida and Greater Noida

assumptions: Physically completed ready-to-move project with OC, exempting buyers from GST (0%).
Secondary market transactions subject to bipartite registrations.

payment_plan.plan_name: Standard Ready to Move Resale Plan

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Urbtech Hilston is a highly efficient, mid-market ready-to-move-in society in Sector 79, Noida, offering excellent pricing, clean legal compliance, and immediate occupancies.
why_buy: Highly attractive pricing (approx ₹10,000/sqft), offering an affordable entry to a premium sector.
Ready-to-move status with OCs received and active registries, completely bypassing construction risks.
Three-side open, highly ventilated layout ensuring excellent natural lighting.
why_avoid: Limited premium luxury cues (retains high-quality standard finishes rather than ultra-luxury marble).
Density in Phase 1 is slightly higher than ultra-low-density projects.
decision_profile.best_for: Budget-conscious nuclear families and senior executives seeking completed, safe ready homes.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: HNI buyers looking for palatial penthouses, double-height living spaces, or signature vertical gardens.

persona_profile.motivation_note: Seeking clean ready-to-move properties with a highly optimized carpet-to-price ratio.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Urbtech Hilston is a highly recommended 'BUY' for families looking for a mid-market, completely safe ready-to-move-in option. It avoids the legal and delivery issues of larger Sector 79 projects while keeping per-sqft pricing incredibly economical.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: A pristine, peaceful ready home for end-users. Active AOA management, clean gated system, and solid common area maintenance.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: A defensive stable asset with high rental yields (approx 3.8%) and steady 8-10% capital growth.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Safe, clean, and highly comfortable. Proximity to schools and central parks is a massive daily help.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: High rental appeal from mid-management professionals working in Noida's major commercial hubs.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Excellent standard specs featuring modular kitchens, high-quality tiles, and robust sanitary installations.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: No delivery risk: project has been completed with OCs received and families residing since Jan 2024.
walk_away_conditions: Resale listings asking for heavy cash components above registry value.
Resale units with outstanding builder maintenance dues.
negotiation_leverage: Leverage the affordable positioning to squeeze out maximum discounts from resale brokers.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Act immediately if a registered unit is available under ₹10,000 per sqft super area.

competitors.competitor_advantage: Premium finishes and much lower spatial density.
competitors.verdict: Civitech is premium luxury; Urbtech is highly optimized value-for-money.
